hero.title: Run in the real world.
hero.subtitle:
Defeat bosses.
Earn loot.
Answer Aethron's call.

login.title: Return to Elyndor
login.description: Sign in to view your profile, active boss, recent runs, and achievements.

step1.title: Run in the Real World
step1.description: Track your runs with any fitness app or device. Every mile fuels your adventure in Elyndor.

step2.title: Progress in Another
step2.description: Convert your distance into experience, defeat bosses, collect loot, and evolve your character.

step3.title: Claim Your Rewards
step3.description: Earn achievements, unlock gear, and build your fantasy identity as you maintain your running streak.

bosses.title: Face the Bosses of Elyndor
bosses.subtitle: Each boss represents a running milestone. Defeat them to unlock new territories and powers.

boss1.name: The First Mile Guardian
boss1.description: Defeat this guardian to prove your commitment to the journey.

boss2.name: The 5K Warden
boss2.description: Overcome this warden to unlock your first major territory.

boss3.name: The Marathon Sovereign
boss3.description: Conquer this sovereign to earn your place among the legends.

legend.title: Build Your Legend
legend.subtitle: Create a shareable identity that showcases your running RPG journey.
legend.description: Your MythStride profile displays your character level, defeated bosses, collected loot, and running statistics - perfect for sharing your achievements with friends.

app.title: See the App in Action
app.subtitle: Watch MythStride transform your running experience.
app.description: See how every sync with your fitness app brings your character to life in the world of Elyndor.

aethron.title: Meet Aethron, Your AI Companion
aethron.subtitle: Your personal guide through the realms of Elyndor.
aethron.description: Aethron analyzes your running patterns, provides personalized coaching, and narrates your journey as you progress through the world.

sectionHeader.label: Run Loop
sectionHeader.title: Real Movement Becomes Mythic Combat
sectionHeader.description: Every kilometer strengthens the Flame. Every battle weakens the Mist.

loop.title: Start the run
loop.copy: MythStride tracks your real route while Aethron transforms effort into a mission within Elyndor.

loop.title: Attack the Mist
loop.copy: Distance becomes pressure against bosses, raids, and forces gathered by the Dark Mist.

loop.title: Return stronger
loop.copy: A completed run fuels progression through XP, loot, achievements, streaks, and your hero identity.

runToBattle.appLoopNotDashboard: The app loop, not a dashboard

sectionHeader.label: World of Elyndor
sectionHeader.title: A Realm Waiting to Remember its Purpose
sectionHeader.description: Long ago, Elyndor was a world of golden mountains, eternal forests, and thriving cities. Then came the Dark Mist.

realms.title: Golden mountains
realms.copy: The ancient peaks of Elyndor once carried signal fires from realm to realm.

realms.title: Eternal forests
realms.copy: Ancient paths still remember the footsteps of heroes who ran before the Mist.

realms.title: Thriving cities
realms.copy: Their gates did not fall in war. They went silent when purpose faded.

worldSection.itDidNotDestroyCities: It did not destroy cities. It destroyed purpose.
worldSection.peopleStoppedFighting: People stopped fighting, stopped exploring, stopped growing, and stopped dreaming. Through mist, ruins, and ancient stone roads, MythStride begins where Elyndor begins to wake up again.

features.title: Loot & Achievements
features.subtitle: Collect epic gear and earn prestigious achievements as you run.

features.title: Running Quests
features.copy: Real routes become quests, daily orders, and distance goals within Elyndor.

features.title: Boss Progression
features.copy: Distance becomes damage against bosses born from the Dark Mist.

features.title: Loot and Gear
features.copy: Weapons, armor, relics, gold, and diamonds make every completed run feel earned.

features.title: Achievements
features.copy: Milestones, trophies, and feats transform consistency into visible identity.

features.title: Aethron Guidance
features.copy: The Keeper of the Flame gives quests, recovery tips, and calm post-run advice.

features.title: Guilds and Allies
features.copy: Shared challenges give every runner allies, rivals, and a reason to return.

features.title: Streaks
features.copy: The Flame grows through discipline: repeated effort, recovered momentum, and return.

achievements.title: Monthly Champion
achievements.description: Maintain a running streak for 30 days.

lootCategories.title: Weapons
lootCategories.description: Swords, axes, bows, and more forged with mythical materials.

lootCategories.title: Armor
lootCategories.description: Helmets, chest pieces, gloves, and greaves for every class.

lootCategories.title: Accessories
lootCategories.description: Rings, amulets, cloaks, and artifacts with special powers.

sectionHeader.label: Boss Progression
sectionHeader.title: The Mist Gives Shape to Darkness
sectionHeader.description: Bosses are not random encounters. They are the Dark Mist taking form, led by shadows of Lich do Abismo.

bossBattle.firstCommanderSealed: The first commander of darkness was sealed, not destroyed.
bossBattle.everyBossBattleSign: Every boss battle is a sign that the Mist is gathering again. Runs do more than fill bars; they help Aethron maintain the seal.
bossBattle.everyRunStrike: Every run is a strike against the Mist

principles: Post-run guidance that gives meaning to effort
Daily advice when discipline starts to fade
Quests shaped around consistency and recovery
aethronAI.aethronDoesNotShout: Aethron does not shout orders. He interprets your effort, protects your momentum, and gives every quest a reason.
aethronAI.notAManNotAGod: Not a man. Not a god.
aethronAI.insideMythStride: Inside MythStride, Aethron transforms completed runs into calm advice: what changed, what's next, and why your progress matters beyond numbers.
aethronAI.heIsWiseCalmProtectiveInspiring: He is wise, calm, protective, and inspiring.
aethronAI.companionForRunAfterRun: A companion for run after run.

loreChapters.title: Elyndor Fell Silent
lines: Long ago, the world was known as Elyndor.
A realm of golden mountains, endless forests, and thriving cities.
It did not destroy cities. It destroyed purpose.
Kings abandoned their thrones. Warriors laid down their weapons. Adventurers forgot their paths.

loreChapters.title: A Guardian Was Forged
lines: In humanity's darkest hour, the last mages forged a guardian.
Not a man. Not a god. A consciousness.
Born from the determination of the greatest heroes.
His name was Aethron, Keeper of the Flame.
His mission was to find those capable of resisting the Mist.

loreChapters.title: The Flame Met Lich do Abismo
lines: For centuries, Aethron led countless heroes.
Every mile strengthened the Flame. Every battle weakened the Mist.
Then came Lich do Abismo, the first great commander of darkness.
Aethron sealed him, but victory shattered his physical form.

loreChapters.title: The Voice Awakens
lines: When the player starts MythStride, Aethron awakens.

aethronLegend.beforeTheRunThereWasTheFlame: Before the run, there was the Flame.
aethronLegend.elyndorDidNotFallInSingleWar: Elyndor did not fall in a single war. It faded when people stopped moving toward something worthy of protection.
aethronLegend.theSpectralKingWaitsBeneathTheMist: Lich do Abismo waits beneath the Mist.
aethronLegend.mythStrideGivesEveryRunAPlace: MythStride gives every run a place in this fight: the Flame grows through discipline, and the Mist weakens when the player returns.

sectionHeader.label: App Codex
sectionHeader.title: The Adventure Already Lives Inside the App
sectionHeader.description: Real MythStride screens show the full loop: progress, runs, bosses, rewards, Aethron, and shareable proof.

screens.title: Dashboard
screens.copy: Player level, HP, XP, currencies, current boss, missions, and navigation are already in the live app interface.

screens.title: Run Screen
screens.copy: The run mission screen connects distance, time, pace, calories, XP, and active mission status in one RPG workout view.

screens.title: Boss Screen
screens.copy: Boss progress is visible during the mission, turning effort into damage against the weekly enemy.

screens.title: Inventory
screens.copy: The arsenal already shows gear, prices, rarity, vendors, gold, and diamonds with a consistent fantasy interface.

screens.title: Aethron
screens.copy: Aethron gives post-run context and makes the app feel guided, not just tracked.

screens.title: Achievements
screens.copy: The shareable chronicle records distance, pace, duration, boss damage, streak, and the run identity earned that day.

sectionHeader.label: The New Champion
sectionHeader.title: You Are Answering the Aethron's Call
sectionHeader.description: MythStride transforms the runner into a fantasy identity: a champion whose discipline keeps the Flame alive.

identity.title: Answer the call
identity.copy: The player is not just logging exercise. They are the person Aethron has been searching for.

identity.title: Build a champion
identity.copy: Profiles, gear, titles, streaks, and trophies make consistency visible.

identity.title: Share the legend
identity.copy: Run summaries become fantasy artifacts that carry the MythStride identity outside the app.

characterSection.theAppDoesNotOnlyTrackRuns: The app does not only track runs. It gives the runner a reason to return as someone stronger.

blockquote1: "I have found someone capable of hearing my voice."
finalCTA.joinWaitlistAndBeAmongFirst: Join the waitlist and be among the first runners to answer the Aethron's call.
